summary: Backend Modular Routes Refactoring Test - 100% SUCCESS. All 12 route files validated after monolithic server.py (5400+ lines) split. 29 pytest tests passed + 15 additional curl verifications.

TestProfileEndpoints.test_get_profile: PASS - Returns user profile with leagues_count

TestHomeEndpoint.test_get_home: PASS - Returns complete home data structure

route_files_verified.routes/auth.py: PASS - Login, register, verify-email, refresh, username-available, google OAuth
route_files_verified.routes/user.py: PASS - Home, profile, notifications, push-tokens, news, reminders
route_files_verified.routes/leagues.py: PASS - CRUD, join, fixtures, matchdays, matches
route_files_verified.routes/standings.py: PASS - Total, weekly, matchdays, user standings
route_files_verified.routes/live.py: PASS - Live matchday data with polling
route_files_verified.routes/payments.py: PASS - Stripe checkout and status endpoints
route_files_verified.routes/admin.py: PASS - Seasons, matchdays, matches, leagues management, v3 console
route_files_verified.routes/fixtures.py: PASS - API-Football integration, import, live refresh loop
route_files_verified.routes/stats.py: PASS - API-Football public data (standings, results, upcoming)
route_files_verified.routes/rbac.py: PASS - Permissions, roles, users management, admin operations
route_files_verified.server.py: PASS - Main FastAPI app hub, router includes, lifecycle events

critical_code_review_comments: Refactoring successfully split 5400+ line monolithic server.py into 12 focused route modules
All routers properly registered in server.py with correct prefixes
MongoDB _id properly excluded from API responses
Authentication and authorization working across all route files
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend modular refactoring complete and verified. All 12 route files (auth, user, leagues, predictions, standings, live, payments, admin, fixtures, stats, rbac) working correctly. Main server.py now 182 lines acting as thin hub. No bugs introduced during refactoring.

mocked_apis_list: Email service for password resets - logged to console instead of sending actual emails
